KHAS Short Film Competition Awards Won!

The KHAS Short Film Competition, which was organized by our Department of Radio, Television and Cinema for the first time this year with the theme of “Game”, ended with a very enjoyable award ceremony! Aiming to support students’ short film production, 9 films were shortlisted among 109 films that applied to our competition this year.

“Once Upon a Time” Salih Karaman

“Oyun” Bergen Övül

“Sparks 2048” Yiğit Batuk

“The State of Nature” Efe Dikdaş

Our main jury members Mert Fırat, Elif Akçalı, Esin Paça Cengiz and our Rector Prof. Dr. Sondan Durukanoğlu Feyiz presented the following films with awards:

Congratulations to the teams of the winning films and to all our participants! Godspeed.

See you again in the coming years with new themes and movies!
